judgment.summary: Rapidly growing company with high sales multiples and negative margins, but a strong cash position and analyst support.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus; next earnings date 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth 63.5% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Total cash $1.38B vs total debt $138.67M — healthy liquidity.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a mean target of $100.84.
Last quarter EPS beat estimate by 11.0%.
negatives: Operating margin -22.4% and profit margin -26.9% — currently unprofitable.
Price/Sales (TTM) 106.28x and Price/Book 39.39x — very high valuation multiples.

news.paragraph: Rocket Lab's stock experienced a decline following the announcement of a significant $3 billion distribution agreement. While the details of the agreement are still unfolding, the market reaction suggests some investor concern or uncertainty regarding its implications. Traders should monitor further commentary on the deal and its impact on future revenue streams and profitability.

headlines.title: Rocket Lab Stock Falls After Announcing $3 Billion Distribution Agreement
Bond Markets Are Bullying the U.K. and Japan. One Has the Right Defenses.

examples.body: $RKLB $3 to $4 Billion just in near term revenue. Just keeps growing Revenue
$RKLB ATM offering is obviously fuel to some expansion. Waiting on news soon. Buy before it's too late.
$RKLB Lots of millions, Billions will migrate to Space X from here, June 10 will be very painful, if not before!
$RKLB I want ONE more pullback, before it rips!
$RKLB can't wait to learn what company SPB and Adam Spice are purchasing next for the RKLB portfolio. $5 billion will fuel a major expansion.
